channel.title: Notable Artists Born Today
channel.description: RSS feed of notable writers, poets, directors, and actors born on this day in history.

item.title: Hamish Hamilton (director)
item.description: Hamish Hamilton (born Mark Hamilton; 8 April 1966) is a British director. He has directed the Super Bowl halftime show annually since 2010. He has also directed the Academy Awards and the MTV Video Music Awards, and worked with music artists such as Mariah Carey, Eminem, Madonna, The Who and U2. He directed the filming of the opening and closing ceremonies for the 2012 Summer Olympics.

item.title: Jesse Johnson (actor)
item.description: Jesse Wayne Johnson (born December 7, 1982) is an American actor. He is the son of actors Don Johnson and Patti D'Arbanville.

item.title: James Olson (actor)
item.description: James Olson (October 8, 1930 – April 17, 2022) was an American actor.
